query: Nintendo Direct June 2026 announcement date confirmed Zelda Ocarina of Time remake Switch 2
answer:
Now I have a comprehensive picture. Let me compile my findings.

---

## Research Report: Nintendo Direct June 2026 & Zelda Ocarina of Time Remake for Switch 2

### 1. Nintendo Direct June 2026 — No Confirmed Date

As of June 4, 2026, **no Nintendo Direct for June 2026 has been officially announced or confirmed by Nintendo.** Based on data from the Wikipedia article on Nintendo Directs (which tracks all official presentations), the most recent 2026 Nintendo Directs were:

| Date | Presentation | Focus |
|------|-------------|-------|
| January 25, 2026 | The Super Mario Galaxy Movie Direct | Second movie trailer |
| January 29, 2026 | Nintendo Direct | Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream |
| February 5, 2026 | Nintendo Direct: Partner Showcase | Switch 2 and Switch partner games |
| February 27, 2026 | Pokémon Presents | Pokémon updates |
| March 3, 2026 | Indie World | Indie games for Switch & Switch 2 |
| March 9, 2026 | Super Mario Galaxy Movie Direct | Final movie trailer |
| **May 6, 2026** | **Nintendo Direct** | **Star Fox (most recent)** |

The Star Fox Direct on May 6/7, 2026 was a surprise Direct announced only 10 minutes before broadcast. **No June 2026 Nintendo Direct has been listed or confirmed.**

**Contextual note:** Summer Game Fest 2026 runs **June 5–8, 2026** at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles. Nintendo has historically hosted Directs around the Summer Game Fest / E3 window (e.g., June 21 Nintendo Direct in a prior year per Summer Game Fest Wikipedia), but nothing has been confirmed for June 2026 yet. Nintendo often announces Directs with very little lead time (sometimes days or even minutes before broadcast).

### 2. Zelda: Ocarina of Time Remake for Switch 2 — NOT Announced

**There is no confirmed or announced Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake for Switch 2.** Based on thorough searches of:
- The Nintendo Switch 2 Wikipedia article (no mention of "Ocarina" anywhere)
- The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time Wikipedia article (no mention of Switch 2 remake)
- Wikipedia search results for "Ocarina of Time remake Switch 2"
- The Legend of Zelda series page

The only Ocarina of Time remake that exists is **Ocarina of Time 3D** (2011) for Nintendo 3DS, developed by Grezzo. The original is available via Nintendo Switch Online's N64 library. No Switch 2-native remake has been announced.

### 3. Nintendo Switch 2 Context (for reference)

- **Switch 2 launched in June 2025** with a one-hour Nintendo Direct on April 2, 2025
- **46 third-party games** were confirmed at launch, with 17 on day one
- **Switch 2 upgrades** were announced for: Metroid Prime 4, Zelda: Breath of the Wild, Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom, Super Mario Party Jamboree, Pokémon Legends: Z-A, and Kirby and the Forgotten Land
- Both Zelda BOTW and TOTK upgrades were **launch titles** for the Switch 2
- **GameCube games** came to Nintendo Switch Online including Wind Waker, F-Zero GX, and Soulcalibur II
- **Star Fox** (a Star Fox 64 remake/reboot) is releasing **June 25, 2026** for Switch 2 — the most recent major Nintendo game announcement
- **The Super Mario Galaxy Movie** is in active promotion with multiple Directs

### 4. Key Conclusion

The research question appears to combine two unverified claims:
1. **A June 2026 Nintendo Direct** — Not yet confirmed (as of June 4, 2026), though one could be announced at any time given Nintendo's pattern
2. **Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake for Switch 2** — No evidence whatsoever of an official announcement; this appears to be rumor/speculation/wishful thinking

key_facts: No Nintendo Direct for June 2026 has been officially announced or confirmed as of June 4, 2026.
The most recent Nintendo Direct was the Star Fox Direct on May 6, 2026, which was a surprise announcement made just 10 minutes before broadcast.
Summer Game Fest 2026 runs June 5-8, 2026 at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles — Nintendo has historically hosted Directs around this window but has not confirmed one for 2026.
There is NO confirmed or announced Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake for Nintendo Switch 2. No mention of such a project exists on any official or encyclopedic source.
The only Ocarina of Time remake is Ocarina of Time 3D (2011) for Nintendo 3DS, developed by Grezzo.
Nintendo Switch 2 launched in June 2025 with 46 third-party games confirmed and 17 at launch.
Switch 2 upgrades were announced for Zelda: BOTW, Zelda: TOTK, Metroid Prime 4, and others — both Zelda upgrades were launch titles.
Star Fox (a Star Fox 64 reboot/remake) releases June 25, 2026 for Switch 2 — this is the most recent major Nintendo game announcement.

2026 Nintendo Directs so far: Jan 25 (Mario Galaxy Movie), Jan 29 (Tomodachi Life), Feb 5 (Partner Showcase), Feb 27 (Pokemon Presents), Mar 3 (Indie World), Mar 9 (Mario Galaxy Movie), May 6 (Star Fox).
GameCube games were added to Nintendo Switch Online at Switch 2 launch including Wind Waker, F-Zero GX, and Soulcalibur II.
